untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition (broadening wedge with two down-sloping trend lines) cannot be expressed using only price, volume, and technical indicators from the allowed list. Trend line detection and pattern geometry require custom pattern detection logic not available in the standard indicator set.
translation_notes: Translated available quantifiable conditions: heavy breakout volume (volume > hvol_20) and upward breakout (close > prev_high). Exit condition based on trend change detection using SMA crossover as proxy for trend reversal. Hold period set to 42 days (~6 weeks) per author guidance. Stop loss and profit targets set to reasonable defaults (3% stop, 6 weeks hold) since author provided no guidance. True pattern validation requires custom pattern detection outside backtest engine scope.
